changelog: NEW: Image content scanner (step 3) — stream integrity validation (JPEG/PNG) + pixel analysis (JPEG, PNG, GIF, BMP, TIFF, WEBP) detecting gray/color buffers, channel dropout, corruption bands (RAW camera formats not supported)
Pure C# JPEG/PNG stream validator — detects truncated/damaged streams (missing EOI etc.) without external tools
Multi-stage checkpoint & resume (steps 1-3, per-file resume in image analysis)
Resume prompt after Stop and after power loss
Statistics now counted from actual folders (accurate after interruptions)
Scan duration excludes pauses; average speed for actual scan time
Stats summary window with re-open button and TXT export
TXT export headers for all three lists, translated
Move retry + copy fallback + move_errors_log.csv for unmovable files
Improved file counting on NAS shares (dedup/tiering reparse points, system files)
Single Stop button for all steps; step name shown under buttons
